prompt: Create a cinematic luxury perfume advertisement still in a warm, dark, candlelit interior. Show a glamorous woman in close-up from the chest up, positioned slightly left of center, with her face intentionally obscured by a large solid medium-brown rectangular block covering the central upper face area. She has dark wavy hair pinned loosely with strands falling around her neck, wears long sparkling gold chandelier earrings, and a shimmering metallic gold evening dress with pleated sequins and a low neckline. Her right hand is raised near the right side of the frame holding an elegant faceted rectangular glass perfume bottle filled with amber liquid, with a geometric gold cap catching the light. Use golden candlelight, shallow depth of field, soft bokeh flames in the background, dark reflective walls, and a sensual high-fashion editorial mood. Add a small white “Pollo.ai” watermark in the top-right corner. Horizontal 16:9 composition, photorealistic, cinematic color grading, rich amber and bronze tones, no extra text.
